title: Androidium
description: A lightweight optimization pack designed to reach a great amound of FPS on phones.
body:
Androidium is a lightweight Minecraft optimization modpack designed specifically for Android devices and low-end hardware.

This modpack focuses on maximizing FPS, stability, and smooth gameplay while keeping the vanilla experience intact. It removes unnecessary lag sources and adds modern performance mods to ensure Minecraft runs smoothly even on devices with limited RAM and weaker GPUs.

Perfect for players using Android Java launchers or low-spec PCs who want better performance without changing the core game.
